projects.name: 1 Federal Square — MEP Retrofit
projects.risk_note: Mechanical scope expansion plus chilled-water tie-in cost overruns from Procore feed. Forecast at-complete $4.2M over budget.

projects.name: Harbor Point Plaza — Lobby & Amenity
projects.risk_note: On track. Tenant tour calendar shows 31% lift in scheduled visits since reposition announcement.

projects.name: Eastgate Distribution Center — Phase II
projects.risk_note: 650k sqft cross-dock. Lease commitments cover 72% of GLA pre-completion.

projects.name: The Avenue at Westgate — Mixed-Use Block
projects.risk_note: Concrete tariff pass-through and labor escalation. Retail pre-leasing at 38% vs target 55% for current phase.

projects.name: The Aldridge — Building Systems Modernization
projects.risk_note: Electrification of central plant plus heat-pump conversion. Projected 38% reduction in scope-1 emissions, eligible for IRA 179D deduction.

projects.name: Park Avenue 1455 — Sub-Cellar Vault Conversion
projects.risk_note: RFP in market for design-build, mobilization 3Q26.

projects.name: Pier 9 Tower — Curtainwall Replacement
projects.risk_note: Curtainwall failure remediation. Insurance recovery offsetting 31% of project cost.

projects.name: 100 South Wacker — Conference & Wellness Floor
projects.risk_note: Awaiting board approval. Modeled 110 bps occupancy lift over 18 months.

projects.name: Riverbend One — Solar PV + BESS
projects.risk_note: 1.2 MW rooftop PV plus 2.4 MWh battery. Demand-charge savings tracking ahead of underwriting.

projects.name: Granite Place — Office-to-Residential Conversion Study
projects.risk_note: Pre-development. Feasibility on partial conversion of floors 4-12. Zoning analysis underway.

top_5_summary_notes: Office reposition projects skew amber on construction-cost escalation; industrial ground-up build delivering on plan.
ESG capex projects show highest projected yield-on-cost (avg 9.4%) driven by IRA incentives plus tenant willingness-to-pay green premium.
Procore cost feed is the leading indicator — average 6-week lead time on budget variance signal vs traditional monthly accounting close.
